sentences.text: Of course, I would not dream of doing so if I were not your friend.
But what is the good of friendship if one cannot say exactly what one means?
Anyone can say nice things and try to please others, but a true friend will say unpleasant things and doesn't mind causing discomfort.
In fact, if he is a real friend, he prefers it because he knows he is doing good.
